_note: The serial-numbers-filed map: Forgotten Realms / D&D proper nouns -> original equivalents. Applied by tools/reskin.js as WHOLE-WORD, CASE-SENSITIVE replacements, longest-key-first (so 'Wall of the Faithless' resolves before 'Faithless'). The game's VALUE (souls, systems, code, emotional writing) is original and untouched; this only swaps the ~60 proprietary names sitting on top. Game mechanics are not copyrightable and the 5.1 SRD is CC-BY-4.0, so the d20 engine needs no changes. 'tiefling' is intentionally KEPT (it is in the CC SRD 5.1). Every value is tunable — this is a starting pantheon, not scripture.

_keep.tiefling: in the CC-licensed SRD 5.1 — free to use
_keep.Half-Elf / Half-Orc / Elf / Dwarf / Gnom: generic fantasy races in the SRD
